posts.author: naama (Naama Erez)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi,
We need the option to automatically connect tasks that were created from a monday doc to the doc parent item.

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to track tasks related to specific meeting along with the meeting summary.

Use case for example:
Meetings board that has monday doc column with specific template.
We would like to automatically see the tasks created from this meeting and its statuses from the board itself.
